calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Peter Bresler appearing via zoom for Eric Louie (petitioner).

Mr. Bresler stated that he does not know what the guns are worth, and that they are still in the process of gathering information regarding the values of the guns and getting them appraised by the referee. Mr. Bresler also spoke of the manner in which the guns are being stored, and informed the Court that the Petitioner lives in the house where the guns are located. Mr. Bresler also stated that there are about 16 to 17 guns, that as soon as he knows what the guns are worth, he can do a supplemental inventory and appraisal and that he will be ready for the close of the estate. The Court noted that there is no proposed order and takes this petition off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for July 26, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bresler needs to have the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status on administration filed by July 17, 2023. If there is no petition of final distribution, the court wants a declaration from the petitioner regarding the safe storage of guns.

Judge; Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Continued To May-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for and with Eric Louie, in court, Administrator.

Upon query by the court, Mr. Bresler reports as to why he missed the previous calling and mentions that should the court order sanctions, $500 appears to be high. The court considers Mr. Bresler's request and advises that it is ordering payment of sanctions in the amount of $250, payable to the Clerk of the Court one week from today's date. The court and Mr. Louie discuss the gun collection with Mr. Louie reporting that the collection is stored in a room where decedent lived and that he has an inventory of the guns with him. The court instructs the parties that the gun inventory is to be forwarded to the probate referee for inclusion in the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A). The court acknowledges the I&A previously filed with the court and instructs Mr. Bresler to file a supplemental I&A, forthwith.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause are taken off calendar. The remaining subject matter is continued to May-03-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Continued To Mar-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Eric Wayne Louie and the Attorney Peter H. Bresler to appear on March 08, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why a corrected final or a supplemental inventory and appraisal has not been filed, and why they failed to address the examiner's notes. In addition, an Order to Show Cause will be issued to attorney Peter H. Bresler to appear and explain why $500.00 in sanctions should not be imposed for his failure to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt/Jackie Alameda. Deputy: Pleigo. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Eric Louie, Administrator.

Counsel reports that health issues, staffing issues due to COVID, and issues accessing some of the property have caused the delays in this matter.

The matter is continued to Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
